changes.motivation: Fix TypeScript errors caused by missing type definitions for html-minifier-terser.
changes.summary: Added `@types/html-minifier-terser@7.0.2` as a pinned devDependency in `packages/website/package.json` and updated `bun.lock` accordingly.

changes.motivation: The manual module declaration in extends.d.ts was a workaround that became redundant once the official `@types` package was installed.
changes.summary: Removed the manual `declare module 'html-minifier-terser'` block from `packages/website/src/extends.d.ts`.

problems: The `extends.d.ts` file contained a manual type declaration for `html-minifier-terser` that was added as a workaround but never cleaned up when official `@types` were available, requiring discovery by inspection rather than being self-documenting about why the manual declaration existed or when it could be removed.
